metadata.safety_note: This dataset is a synthetic, non-operational reference layer. It does not contain real unit procedures, classified systems, real orders, or rules of engagement.
metadata.intended_use: Help map D4D Resilient Maritime COP demo objects to public command-and-control communication concepts.

source_references.title: U.S. Army ADP 5-0 The Operations Process
source_references.use: operations process: planning, preparing, executing, assessing

source_references.title: U.S. Army FM 6-0 Commander and Staff Organization and Operations
source_references.use: C2 system, command posts, staff processes, battle rhythm, reports and meetings

source_references.title: U.S. Army FM 6-99 Report and Message Formats
source_references.use: public reference for standardized report/message families

source_references.title: CJCSM 3130.02 Joint Planning and Execution Policies and Procedures
source_references.use: joint planning and execution transition from plans to orders

operation_flow.plain_korean: 상급 지휘부가 목표, 제약, 우선순위, 필요한 효과를 제시한다.
참모가 상황을 분석하고 가능한 방책과 위험을 비교한다.
하급 조직이 미리 준비할 수 있도록 경고명령 또는 사전 알림을 보낸다.
작전명령으로 상황, 임무, 실행, 지속지원, 지휘/통신 기준을 전달한다.
작전 중 보고와 상황판 업데이트가 계속 들어오고, 지휘관은 필요한 결정을 내린다.
상황이 바뀌면 전체 명령을 다시 쓰기보다 바뀐 부분만 빠르게 갱신한다.
작전이 의도한 방향으로 가는지 계속 평가하고 다음 결심에 반영한다.

message_families.name: Warning Order
message_families.plain_korean: 곧 명령이나 임무가 올 수 있으니 준비하라는 사전 알림

synthetic_example.summary: Maritime weather and OSINT context may affect monitoring in the Yellow Sea AOI.

message_families.name: Operation Order
message_families.plain_korean: 작전 수행의 기준이 되는 본 명령

synthetic_example.summary: Maintain maritime COP and prioritize evidence-backed alerts under degraded network conditions.
synthetic_example.safe_note: Synthetic high-level mission framing; not a real order.

message_families.name: Fragmentary Order
message_families.plain_korean: 기존 명령 중 바뀐 부분만 빠르게 전달하는 갱신 명령

synthetic_example.summary: Switch COP transmission to semantic-summary mode due to link degradation.

message_families.name: Situation Report
message_families.plain_korean: 현재 상황/부대/지역 상태를 주기적으로 정리하는 보고

synthetic_example.summary: AOI contains one high-priority alert, degraded weather context, and reduced link capacity.

message_families.name: Spot Report
message_families.plain_korean: 즉시 알릴 가치가 있는 관측/사건을 짧게 보고

synthetic_example.summary: AIS gap overlaps SAR-like detection and reduced visibility in Yellow Sea AOI.
synthetic_example.safe_note: Synthetic report-like event; does not identify a real vessel.

message_families.name: Intelligence Summary
message_families.plain_korean: 여러 정보 출처를 평가해 요약한 정보 판단

synthetic_example.summary: Open-source context supports monitoring but does not prove hostile intent.
Port approach delay may affect support timing.

message_families.name: Network Status
message_families.plain_korean: 통신 링크 품질과 전송 가능 상태를 보고

synthetic_example.summary: Ship-to-shore link degraded to semantic-summary mode.

information_requirements.plain_korean: 작전지역에서 협조 신호가 사라진 선박과 독립 센서 관측이 겹치는가?
information_requirements.reason: Could change monitoring priority under limited bandwidth.

information_requirements.plain_korean: COP를 갱신할 수 없을 정도로 지휘통신 링크가 저하되었는가?
information_requirements.reason: Determines whether raw data, deltas, or only alert cards can move.

information_requirements.plain_korean: 공개 출처의 사건/기상/항만 정보가 해상 감시 우선순위를 바꾸는가?
information_requirements.reason: Adds context and urgency, but should remain evidence-backed and non-attributive.

information_requirements.plain_korean: 공개 데모에 실제 식별자, 민감정보, 원본 데이터가 노출되는가?

semantic_event.explanation: A compact operationally meaningful report derived from one or more observations.

evidence_bundle.explanation: Keeps source references, confidence, trust, freshness, and disagreement visible.

priority_packet.explanation: Determines what survives when only a limited number of messages can move.

grounded_briefing.explanation: Summarizes only evidence-backed claims and recommended actions.

network_mode.explanation: Models how full sync, delta sync, semantic summary, store-forward, or local-only modes change what gets transmitted.
